description: Generation benchmark: scenarios for evaluating generated Playwright test quality. Each scenario defines static code-quality checks applied to the generated TypeScript.

scenarios.feature_description: User can log in with valid credentials and sees the secure area

scenarios.description: Checkbox interaction — toggle checkboxes on the page
scenarios.feature_description: User can check and uncheck checkboxes and verify their state

scenarios.description: Dropdown selection — choose an option from a select element
scenarios.feature_description: User can select an option from a dropdown and verify the selection

scenarios.description: Dynamic elements — add and remove elements on a page
scenarios.feature_description: User can add elements by clicking a button and remove them, verifying counts change

scenarios.description: Static page — navigate and verify basic content
scenarios.feature_description: User can navigate to the page and see the main heading
